data.body: AC amendment (gap analysis — implicit_assumption): sprint-drift-check.sh must parse multiple file impact heading formats: (1) '## File Impact' with bullet-list paths (from enrich-file-impact.sh), (2) markdown table format '| File | Action | Task(s) |' (from implementation-plan), and (3) '## Files to Create' / '## Files to Modify' headings with bullet paths. Use case-insensitive matching for heading detection. Also: git log --since requires '@' prefix for Unix epoch timestamps (e.g., --since=@1775352108), not raw integers.
